glosses.es: día de la semana; día laborable
glosses.fr: jour de la semaine; jour ouvrable
glosses.zh-Hans: 一周中的一天; 工作日
glosses.yue: 一星期中的一天; 工作天
glosses.vi: ngày trong tuần; ngày làm việc

translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, c'est un jour de semaine.
translations.vi: Hôm nay là ngày trong tuần.

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame of the clause.
Finite present (3rd sg) of 'sein' used as a copula linking subject and predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, nominative singular (masc./neut.), determiner of 'Wochentag'.
Common noun, singular masculine; predicate nominal classifying the day as a weekday.

sentences.target: Ich arbeite jeden Wochentag im Büro.

translations.de: Ich arbeite jeden Wochentag im Büro.
translations.en: I work every weekday at the office.
translations.es: Trabajo en la oficina todos los días laborables.
translations.fr: Je travaille au bureau tous les jours de semaine.
translations.it: Lavoro in ufficio tutti i giorni feriali.
translations.zh-Hans: 我每个工作日都在办公室上班。
translations.yue: 我平日都喺辦公室返工。
translations.ru: Я работаю в офисе каждый будний день.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho no escritório todos os dias de semana.
translations.he: אני עובד במשרד בכל יום חול.
translations.tr: Hafta içi her gün ofiste çalışıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc ở văn phòng mỗi ngày trong tuần.
translations.ar: أعمل في المكتب كل يوم عمل.
translations.nl: Ik werk elke doordeweekse dag op kantoor.
translations.uk: Я працюю в офісі щодня у будні.
translations.hi: मैं हर कार्यदिवस दफ्तर में काम करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Pracuję w biurze w każdy dzień roboczy.
translations.el: Δουλεύω στο γραφείο όλες τις καθημερινές.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber på kontoret hver ukedag.
translations.id: Saya bekerja di kantor setiap hari kerja.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar på kontoret varje vardag.
translations.ro: Lucrez la birou în fiecare zi lucrătoare.
translations.cs: Pracuji v kanceláři každý pracovní den.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder på kontoret alle hverdage.
translations.ja: 平日は毎日オフィスで働きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense (1st sg).
Universal determiner, accusative singular masculine modifying 'Wochentag' in a temporal-accusative phrase ('every').
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the temporal accusative phrase indicating frequency.
Fused form of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative to mark location.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition ('im Büro' = 'in the office').

sentences.target: Der Termin ist an einem Wochentag.

translations.de: Der Termin ist an einem Wochentag.
translations.en: The appointment is on a weekday.
translations.es: La cita es en un día laborable.
translations.it: L'appuntamento è in un giorno feriale.
translations.pt: O compromisso é em um dia de semana.
translations.vi: Cuộc hẹn vào ngày trong tuần.
translations.nl: De afspraak is op een doordeweekse dag.
translations.el: Το ραντεβού είναι σε καθημερινή μέρα.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Termin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject/topic of the copular clause.
Finite present (3rd sg) copular auxiliary linking subject and oblique predicate.
Preposition 'an' used temporally ('on/at'), governing dative case.
Indefinite article, dative singular masculine; determiner of 'Wochentag'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'an' indicating the time ('on a weekday').

sentences.target: Wir öffnen jeden Wochentag um acht.

translations.de: Wir öffnen jeden Wochentag um acht.
translations.en: We open at eight every weekday.
translations.es: Abrimos a las ocho todos los días laborables.
translations.fr: Nous ouvrons à huit heures tous les jours de semaine.
translations.it: Apriamo alle otto tutti i giorni feriali.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每个工作日早上八点开门。
translations.ru: Мы открываемся в восемь по будням.
translations.pt: Abrimos às oito todos os dias de semana.
translations.he: אנחנו פותחים בשמונה בכל יום חול.
translations.tr: Hafta içi her gün saat sekizde açıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mở cửa lúc tám giờ vào các ngày trong tuần.
translations.ar: نفتح الساعة الثامنة كل يوم عمل.
translations.nl: We gaan op werkdagen om acht uur open.
translations.uk: Ми відкриваємося о восьмій у будні.
translations.hi: हम हर कार्यदिवस आठ बजे खोलते हैं.
translations.pl: W dni robocze otwieramy o ósmej.
translations.el: Ανοίγουμε στις οκτώ όλες τις καθημερινές.
translations.nb: Vi åpner klokka åtte hver ukedag.
translations.id: Kami buka jam delapan setiap hari kerja.
translations.sv: Vi öppnar klockan åtta varje vardag.
translations.ro: Deschidem la ora opt în fiecare zi lucrătoare.
translations.cs: Každý pracovní den otevíráme v osm.
translations.da: Vi åbner klokken otte alle hverdage.
translations.ja: 平日は毎日8時に開店します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense (1st pl); denotes starting operation.
Universal determiner, accusative singular masculine modifying 'Wochentag' in a temporal-accusative phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the accusative temporal phrase ('every weekday').
Preposition used for clock times, governing accusative.
Cardinal numeral; complement of 'um' giving the clock time.
